===Pokémon: Paldean Winds===
[[File:Eri Paldean Winds.png|thumb|250px|Eri in [[Pokémon: Paldean Winds]]]]
Eri appeared in ''[[PPW03|Take a Breath]]''. [[Hohma]] headed to [[Caph Squad's Base]] in order to interview Eri for a scoop, but instead ended up having a training session with her. When Caph Squad's {{p|Revavroom}} got out of control, Eri stepped forward and calmed the Pokémon down with a [[Lum Berry]], preventing it from causing damage and unknowingly changing Hohma's perception about [[Team Star]].

====Character====
Despite her intimidating stance, Eri is a kind and friendly person, to the point of putting herself in danger to protect her friends from the Caph Squad and welcoming Hohma without any questions. According to her, it is her friends from Caph Squad who give her strength.
